workstreams.title: Backfill Same-Time Market Snapshots
workstreams.why: Market-gap diagnostics need prices for at least one model-supported market at or before each replay cutoff; formal winner-edge claims still need winner markets.
current_evidence: 6 events still need cutoff-valid model-supported market snapshots.
2 events have after-cutoff market rows recorded as excluded diagnostics; 0 still block formal claims.
Market scan status=backfill_attempted_no_winner_definitions with 2433 search results, 0 usable definitions, 6 blocking unresolved rows, and 1 warning-only unresolved rows.
Integrated search/history backfill has been attempted for 7 events; 0 events produced cutoff-valid winner snapshots and 7 events found no 2026 winner definitions.
11 diagnostic non-winner market definitions are available across 1 events; these can support diagnostic market-gap evidence but not formal winner-edge claims.

Market blocker codes: cutoff_valid_winner_snapshot_missing=6, mismatched_season_markets_rejected=6, same_season_winner_definition_missing=6, same_time_winner_snapshot_missing=6, winner_market_definition_missing=6.
Market warning codes: after_cutoff_market_replacement_warning=2, diagnostic_non_winner_market_definitions_available=1, diagnostic_non_winner_snapshots_available=1, non_blocking_market_action=1.
Market action categories: backfill_diagnostic_alternative_market=1, find_same_season_winner_definition=6.
acceptance_checks: Each completed replay event has a cutoff-valid model-supported market snapshot in data/market_snapshots.
Reviewed manual/Codex market inputs enter through archive-reviewed-market-snapshot with reviewer, source, outcome mapping, and cutoff checks.
After-cutoff seed or backfilled rows remain excluded from replay scoring.
formal-readiness no longer emits blocking market_snapshot_required actions.
Any after-cutoff market rows remain excluded from scoring and are reported only as warnings.
verify-readiness-intake reports the relevant market action_ids as resolved.

workstreams.title: Replace or Prove Retrospective Sources
workstreams.why: Codex evidence can support replay only when its source availability is proven before the event cutoff.
current_evidence: 3 source_archive_required readiness actions remain.
Wayback/CDX recheck found 0 cutoff-valid archive candidates for 3 remaining sources.
Replacement search catalogued 14 candidates; 0 are cutoff-valid, 12 still need archive proof, and 5 need content review.
Replacement blocker codes: archive_lookup_failed=5, current_lookup_failed=1, cutoff_archive_missing=8, manual_current_content_review_required=5.
Replacement action categories: find_cutoff_archive=7, retry_lookup=2, review_current_content=1, review_current_content_and_find_archive=4.
acceptance_checks: Each retrospective source has historical_archive proof with archived_at at or before the replay cutoff, or is replaced by a pre-cutoff source.
Source coverage reports archive-backed snapshots instead of retrospective snapshots for the affected events.
formal-readiness no longer emits source_archive_required actions.
command_templates: python -m f1predict.cli discover-source-archives --event miami_gp --event canadian_gp --event barcelona_gp --output reports\source_archives\remaining_blockers_cdx_discovery.json
python -m f1predict.cli source-replacement-candidates --event miami_gp --event canadian_gp --event barcelona_gp --write

workstreams.title: Regenerate Formal Replay Freeze
workstreams.why: The replay state must be regenerated and fingerprinted after input blockers are resolved.
current_evidence: formal_backtest_ready=False.
blocking_action_count=9.
acceptance_checks: replay-report, analyze-replay, formal-readiness, calibration-report, and replay-freeze-manifest are rerun after input fixes.
replay-freeze-manifest has no formal_edge_claim_not_ready integrity flag.
Disk, CLI, and API freeze hashes match.

workstreams.title: Recalibrate Probabilities After Input Fixes
workstreams.why: Probability and edge claims need enough scored events and market-scored events after input blockers are resolved.
current_evidence: calibration status=diagnostic_only.
scored_events=8; market_scored_events=1.
warnings=diagnostic_only_not_formal_probability_calibration, same_replay_inputs_as_current_diagnostic_pipeline, small_sample_less_than_20_scored_events, market_scored_subset_incomplete.
acceptance_checks: Calibration is rerun after market/source blockers are fixed.
Market-scored subset covers the replay events used for edge analysis.
Overconfidence and top-pick bins are reviewed before promoting edge claims.

workstreams.title: Review Misses and Model Assumptions
workstreams.why: Model ranking and confidence tuning should use the frozen replay after input integrity is fixed.
current_evidence: Current diagnostic top-pick hit rate=0.5.
Calibration currently remains diagnostic and small-sample.
Model error review found 4/8 replay misses.
Most misses still ranked the actual winner near the front; prioritize probability/ranking calibration before large model rewrites.
Race-pace priors frequently favored the wrong top pick; review FastF1 form weighting, team baseline strength, and track-affinity scaling.
Qualifying/grid priors favored the wrong top pick in some misses; add session-specific qualifying features before increasing grid influence.
acceptance_checks: Use only frozen replay inputs for model comparisons.
Run matched ablations before changing strategy, pace, reliability, or evidence weights.
Use model-error-review to choose the next ablation factor before editing simulator defaults.
Label model changes as diagnostic until the experiment controls are matched.
